stimulus:

response: {"creativity-rating":2,"creativity-free-response":"Well the whole objective is is so basic and was shown in alot of minigames like this before, also its kinda impossible or hard to reach the the last mailbox without you getting caught and restarting the whole level.","originality-rating":2,"originality-free-response":"Sadly nothing felt original and there was  no suprises","effectiveness-rating":2,"effectiveness-free-response":"At first i thought the game were bugged but thats just was the way its, the level is so basic and the graphics / design is poorly made not to mention not having any sound.\nNothing felt enjoyable and i was kind of frustrated of how dull the game is because its meant to be like a puzzle timing sort of  game but no its just unorganized simple game","authenticity-rating":2,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":2,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"Didn't feel authentic at all, i felt like it was ai generated not human made.. also  i'm pretty sure any human wouldn't have an intent of making such game with all respect, it was like no effort was done what so ever."}
